prose:
**Ethylene HOMO–LUMO frontier-orbital gap** — DFT, tier `standard` (**B3LYP/def2-TZVP**, density-fitted) in PySCF, **gas phase**, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied input file (`ethylene.xyz`); single-point calculation (geometry not relaxed). SCF converged in 6 cycles. **HOMO–LUMO gap = 7.4357165 eV** (Koopmans-style orbital gap from orbital energies HOMO = −7.6156 eV, LUMO = −0.1799 eV). Total electronic energy = −2139.454 eV (−78.623 Hartree). Integrity: trustworthy. Command: `frontier --method dft --tier standard --charge 0 --mult 1 /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/ethylene/ethylene.xyz`.</prose>
<parameter name="integrity_trustworthy">true
